active_verify.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; OUT=/tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json; LOG=/tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.log; HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json "$OUT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 || true; compute min_equal_prefix_tokens'

change.description: Repackage original c8 fixture rows4..7 as a compact c4 fixture and compare no-rowchunk full-attention diagnostics against rowchunk2.

findings: Original c8 rows4..7 remain red when repackaged as a compact c4 no-rowchunk workload, even under the c4 rows0..3 dense-context/batch-gate/native-O fallback: prefixes [45,11,83,137].
The native paged no-rowchunk control on the same compact tail fixture is also red at [45,31,68,137].

The same compact tail fixture is fully green under rowchunk2 and rowchunk1 native-paged controls ([137]*4), so the residual c8 red rows are prompt-identity/full-attention row-grouping issues that rowchunking eliminates, not an eight-row scheduler/sampler issue.

guard.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

prompt_verifier.evidence: Materially advances focused full-attention evidence: the compact tail rows4..7 no-rowchunk workload is red, while rowchunk2 and rowchunk1 controls are generated-token green at [137]*4. No performance claim.

blockers: full-attention context forced to row-local dense diagnostic path with batch gate

c4_rows4_7_nochunk_dense_context_batch_g.label: c4_rows4_7_nochunk_dense_context_batch_gate_native_o

blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
native c>N decode is experimental and blocked until generated-token equality passes
projection dispatch: no c-aware projection candidate applies to this row count
